title: LegenVD
description:
Magic the Gathering strategy videos with a focus on the digital Magic Arena.
This channel is supported by its fans on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

videos.title: He spoke and removed all doubt.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a blue/red/green landfall combo deck, featuring Flubs, the Fool as commander in Brawl.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

00:00 - Intro
01:38 - Deck Tech
08:36 - vs Eluge, the Shoreless Sea
14:38 - vs Helga, Skittish Seer
21:39 - vs Ygra, Eater of All
32:16 - vs Reidane, God of the Worthy
38:16 - vs Vivien, Arkbow Ranger
44:06 - vs Obeka, Splitter of Seconds
49:35 - vs Old Stickfingers
54:08 - vs Zareth San, the Trickster
59:01 - vs Jessie Zane, Fangbringer

Decklist: 
https://aetherhub.com/Deck/flubs-the-fool-brawl
